purpose: Machine-readable SpiritCore authority registry for preventing duplicate systems, unsafe provider behavior, and accidental ACTIVE or production writes.

systems.purpose: Authoritative SpiritCore conversation and intelligence pipeline.
systems.notes: All user-facing intelligence should continue through the orchestrator rather than media or legacy generator routes.

systems.purpose: Canonical Spiritkin identity resolution, validation, prompt fragment generation, and drift checks.
systems.notes: Media prompt construction should reuse identity descriptors instead of recreating canon rules.

systems.purpose: Deterministic safety pre-pass, post-pass, and safety event logging.
systems.notes: Future premium media prompts must pass safety checks before provider execution.

systems.purpose: Conversation continuity, structured memories, memory briefs, and long-term SpiritMemory.
systems.notes: Raw media failures should not write memory. Approved media milestones may later create structured continuity events.

systems.purpose: Emotion state tracking for conversations and future runtime media selection.
systems.notes: Approved motion assets should map to emotion/session state later.

systems.purpose: Episode summaries and significant continuity events.
systems.notes: Generation attempts should not create episodes until approved.

systems.purpose: Spiritverse scene and world state authority.
systems.notes: Realm source references should align with world/scene canon.

systems.purpose: Voice/TTS authority. Audio remains separate from Runway motion clips.
systems.notes: This route may call the TTS adapter at runtime, but it is not a media-generation provider authority. Media phases must not modify voice behavior unless explicitly requested.

systems.purpose: Wake/session startup and greeting flow authority.
systems.notes: Should select only approved/ACTIVE media once promotion exists.

systems.purpose: Operator UI and admin surface.
systems.notes: Must call backend media services and must not duplicate Runway, path, file, or promotion logic.

systems.purpose: Runway provider payload, auth, execution, and sanitized response boundary.
systems.notes: Provider execution remains gated and staging/operator controlled until a later approved production phase.

systems.purpose: Runway auth/status read-only checks with sanitized provider responses.
systems.notes: Can call organization/status endpoints only; must not call generation endpoints.

systems.purpose: Authoritative future media planning, source mapping, motion-pack, sequence, and SpiritGate planning service.
systems.notes: /admin/media/* is the future authoritative media pipeline. New image/video generator paths should not be created elsewhere.

systems.purpose: Approved canonical source still ingest into APPROVED/source_stills plus optional ARCHIVE copy.
systems.notes: No ACTIVE writes, no manifest update, no motion promotion.

systems.purpose: Approved reviewed provider output ingest into APPROVED plus optional ARCHIVE copy.
systems.notes: No ACTIVE writes and no manifest updates.

systems.purpose: Motion-pack wave and per-Spiritkin media planning.
systems.notes: Plan-only; no provider, ingest, manifest, or ACTIVE writes.

systems.purpose: Plan longer sequences from already approved motion assets.
systems.notes: Plan-only and approved-assets-only.

systems.purpose: Future safe review-space sequence composition execution.
systems.notes: Must remain planned-only until ffmpeg writer and review-space storage policy are explicitly approved.

systems.purpose: Source category readiness and source reference planning.
systems.notes: Blocks generation for asset types missing the required source category.

systems.purpose: Readiness checklist and disabled boundary for premium user-created Spiritkins.
systems.notes: Premium self-generation remains disabled until the readiness checklist is complete and explicitly approved.

systems.purpose: Older generator job and command-center foundation.
systems.notes: Overlap risk with /admin/media/*. Do not add new generation behavior here unless wrapped by the authoritative media pipeline.

systems.purpose: Generated asset lifecycle directory and promotion plan helper.
systems.notes: Helper overlaps with media promotion helpers; should converge before ACTIVE promotion exists.

systems.purpose: Promotion planning and future explicit ACTIVE promotion authority.
systems.notes: Current route is plan-only. Future ACTIVE writes must be explicit, audited, operator-approved, and diagnostics-guarded.

systems.purpose: Read-only validation of route behavior, schema contracts, and authority rules.
systems.notes: Diagnostics must expand before generation or promotion features expand.
